items.content_html: Obsidian Similarity Toolkit is an experimental plugin for Obsidian that adds semantic embedding similarity calculation to your vault using a fully local embedding model, allowing nodes in your vault graph to be positioned according to their semantic similarity to each other, in addition to the various other dimensions already in the graph.
items.title: Jhgallas/obsidian-similarity: Obsidian Similarity Toolkit is an experimental plugin for Obsidian that adds semantic embedding similarity calculation to your vault using a fully local embedding model, allowing nodes in your vault graph to be positioned according to their semantic similarity to each other, in addition to the various other dimensions already in the graph.
